heading: Application of customs reorganization act
label: 1643 Application of customs reorganization act
text: The rights, privileges, powers, and duties vested in or imposed upon the Secretary of the Treasury by this chapter shall be subject to the provisions of subdivision (a) of .section 2073 of this title
notes: References in TextSubdivision (a) of , referred to in text, was repealed by , .section 2073 of this titleact Sept. 3, 1954, ch. 1263, § 1068 Stat. 1229
